architect_design.notes: Design v1: LimbicRewardModule — differentiable reward modulation for equilibrium SNN. Energy pool tracks prediction quality, modulates loss landscape (amplify when confident, dampen when exploring) + LIF thresholds (lower when energy-rich, raise when energy-poor). 9 limbic variants + 3 baselines = 120 runs across 10 folds. Targets the dead-output-neuron problem and signal-starved regime. No RL needed — shaped loss via differentiable energy dynamics. ~6h CPU, ~1.5h GPU. 4 open questions for critic.
